ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.FormAndInfoAndMaterialsTxt: CONTACT DARBY MACFARLANE FOR MORE INFORMATION.
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: ORGANIZATION OPERATES EXCLUSIVELY FOR CHARITABLE SCIENTIFIC, RELIGIOUS, AND EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS.

GrantOrContributionPdDurYrGrp.GrantOrContributionPurposeTxt: CONSTRUCTION OF QUARANTINE STALL FOR SICK HORSES

RecipientBusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: UNITED WAY OF WESTCHESTER AND PUTNAM INC

GrantOrContributionPdDurYrGrp.GrantOrContributionPurposeTxt: "ARTS 4 LEARNING" CURRICULUM IMPLEMENTATION AND "ARTS 4 LEARNING STEM & ARTS INTEGRATION PROJECT"

NonCashPropertyContributionGrp.NoncashPropertyDesc: MULTIPLE SHARES OF PUBLICLY TRADED SECURITIES.

ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.PurposeOfGrantTxt: IMPLEMENTATION OF THE 2018 "PROGRAM FOR EDUCATORS AND STUDENTS" INCLUDING TEACHER WORKSHOPS, WEB REDESIGN AND SOCIAL MEDIA SUPPORT DISSEMINATIG THE EDUCATIONAL PROGRAM FOR TEACHERS AND STUDETS ACROSS THE U.S. TO IMPROVE THE UNDERSTANDING OF THE CONDITIONS UNDERLYING THE HOLOCAUST STILL PRESENT IN THE WORLD TODAY.
ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.ResultsOfVerificationTxt: TO THE KNOWLEDGE OF THE FOUNDATION, AND BASED ON THE REPORT FURNISHED BY THE GRANTEE, NO PART OF THE GRANT HAS BEEN USED FOR OTHER THAN INTENDED PURPOSES.
